**Venise** (French pronunciation: [[vəniz]](/wiki/Help:IPA/French "Help:IPA/French")) is a [commune](/wiki/Communes_of_France "Communes of France") in the [Doubs](/wiki/Doubs "Doubs") [department](/wiki/Departments_of_France "Departments of France") in the [Bourgogne-Franche-Comté](/wiki/Bourgogne-Franche-Comt%C3%A9 "Bourgogne-Franche-Comté") [region](/wiki/Regions_of_France "Regions of France") in eastern [France](/wiki/France "France").
